[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / round

# Method: round()

```ts
round(value, decimals?): number;
```

Round to the closest integer or decimal place.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to round. |
| `decimals?` | `number` | Number of decimal places. Defaults to 0. |

## Returns

`number`

Rounded value.
